Class AddEvent

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
public class AddEvent extends Object
Screen Controller for the Add Event screen From this screen, the user can add an event to a booking and configure its seating configuration
Version:
3.0 April 6 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Meer Ali

    Loads the correct seat map for the Main Hall depending on the selected layout Disables any rows that are unavailable on the seat map

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      FXML initialiser method Clears all fields, sets default values and populates any combo boxes Also handles any listeners

    • Submit

      public void Submit()
      Attempts to store the event into the current booking instance Goes back to the booking screen when successful

    • getLayout

      private String getLayout() throws Exception
      Returns the venue layout depending on the selected venue
      Returns:
      name of the layout
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getEventType

      private String getEventType(String selectedVenue)
      Returns the event type depending on the selected venue
      Parameters:
      selectedVenue - selected venue
      Returns:
      event type

    • calculateCost

      private BigDecimal calculateCost(String venueName, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate)
      Calculates the cost of an event
      Parameters:
      venueName - name of the venue
      startDate - start date
      endDate - end date
      Returns:
      cost

    • showError

      private void showError(String message)

    • BackButton

      public void BackButton()

    • populateRows

      public void populateRows()
      Populates the seat row combo boxes with seat numbers

    • handleMainHallLayout

      private void handleMainHallLayout(String layout)
      Loads the correct seat map for the Main Hall depending on the selected layout Disables any rows that are unavailable on the seat map
      Parameters:
      layout - name of the layout to be shown

    • handleSmallHallLayout

      private void handleSmallHallLayout(String layout)
      Loads the correct seat map for the Small Hall depending on the selected layout Disables any rows that are unavailable on the seat map
      Parameters:
      layout - name of the layout to be shown

    • handleTablesLayout

      private void handleTablesLayout(Integer layout)
      Loads the correct seat map for the Main Hall dining configuration depending on the selected layout
      Parameters:
      layout - number of tables to show

    • enableListManagement

      private void enableListManagement()
      Enables editing for the lists of unavailable seats and restricted seats

    • disableListManagement

      private void disableListManagement()
      Disables editing for the lists of unavailable seats and restricted seats

      Populates the selected list with the seat numbers that have been selected
